sigWerErrors.reason: '到' (arrive/reach) and '得' (can/able to) are different words and change the grammatical structure and meaning of the phrase '听不到' (cannot hear) to '听不得' (cannot bear to hear), which alters the meaning significantly.

'君' (gentleman, monarch) and '军' (army, military) are different characters with different meanings, but in some names or contexts they may sound similar. However, in this context, it likely changes the intended meaning or reference, so it is a minor error.
